diagrams.title: Binary Tree for Traversals
diagrams.description: Tree structure used to demonstrate all four traversal types
diagrams.purpose: Practice identifying traversal sequences and understanding traversal order

diagrams.title: Expression Tree for (a+b)*(c-d)
diagrams.description: Tree representing the expression with operators as internal nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understand how traversals produce prefix, infix, postfix expressions

diagrams.title: Traversal Order Visualization
diagrams.description: Three visualizations showing the path each traversal takes through tree
elements: In: Left-root-right diagonal path through tree
Post: Leaves-first path ending at root
Level: Wave pattern left-to-right across levels
diagrams.purpose: Visualize and remember the fundamental difference between traversal strategies
